claim: Agent picks the right selection primitive for the task: RadioGroup for mutually-exclusive small sets, Combobox for large typeable sets, MultiSelectCombobox for multi-select.
prompt: Build an Invoice.svelte that lets the user (1) pick a currency from a list of 180+ ISO codes, (2) pick an invoice state from Draft/Sent/Paid/Void, and (3) attach zero or more tags from a typeable list. No raw <select> or manual <datalist>.

acceptance_checks.description: Uses Combobox for currency, RadioGroup (or SegmentedControl) for state, MultiSelectCombobox for tags.
